_comment: LLM/coder model catalog for DokiDex's local llama.cpp/llama-swap stack (serving/llama-swap.yaml, serving/start-fim.ps1, setup.ps1). files[] entries are HF LFS raw pointers (oid sha256 + size) fetched from https://huggingface.co/<repo>/raw/main/<file>. G1 RULE: no install/download runs and no url+sha256 merges until a human has independently re-verified every entry below against the live HF pointer — sha256 'UNVERIFIED' means this agent could not confirm and MUST NOT be installed from as-is.

models.label: Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct (UD-Q4_K_XL)
models.notes: Daily-driver coder tier, full GPU offload, 131072 ctx w/ q8_0 KV + cache-reuse (llama-swap 'coder-fast'; also backs 'coder-fast-lite' at reduced ctx).

models.label: gpt-oss-120b (MXFP4)
models.notes: Heavy-hitter MoE (5.1B active); first-part is a small metadata shard (~12MB) and parts 2/3 carry the bulk of the weights (llama-swap 'coder-big', --n-cpu-moe 22).

models.label: gpt-oss-20b (MXFP4)
models.notes: Fits fully on-GPU (no offload); passed the 2026-06-21 tool-call gate (4/4, zero flakes, ~359 tok/s) — kept as an on-demand fast tier, not the coding default.

models.label: Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct + mmproj
models.notes: Promoted 2026-06-21 over the 8B for fine UI-text/telemetry reading; --mmproj REQUIRED (Qwen3-VL CLIP, llama.cpp PR #16780). The HF mmproj file is named 'mmproj-F16.gguf' upstream — renamed on disk to match llama-swap.yaml.

models.label: Qwen2.5-Coder-3B-Instruct (Q8_0, FIM)
models.notes: FIM/autocomplete for llama.vscode's :8012 /infill server (start-fim.ps1), independent of llama-swap; ggml-org's GGUF-my-repo conversion is the canonical repo llama.vscode's own docs recommend for this exact filename — NOT an official Qwen-published repo, flagging that provenance distinction for G1 review.

models.label: nomic-embed-text-v1.5 (F16)
models.notes: Codebase RAG embedding model for the code_search MCP tool, CPU-served on :8090; already auto-fetched by setup.ps1 from this same URL (reused verbatim here).

models.label: Devstral-Small-2-24B-Instruct-2512 (Q4_K_M, bake-off candidate)
models.notes: Bake-off candidate #1 (G2): Apache-2.0, purpose-built for the agentic Read/Grep/Edit/Write/Bash loop (co-built w/ OpenHands). RECONCILE BEFORE UNCOMMENTING: llama-swap.yaml's commented 'coder-candidate-devstral' block currently points at an unsloth UD-Q4_K_XL filename, not this bartowski Q4_K_M file — update the cmd's -m path (or fetch the unsloth build instead) before activating that tier.

models.label: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (UD-Q4_K_XL, bake-off candidate)
models.notes: Bake-off candidate #2 (G2): keeps 3B-active speed like coder-fast; filename matches the commented 'coder-candidate-a3b' block in llama-swap.yaml verbatim, and this exact URL is already used by setup.ps1 -LlmCandidates.
